signals.headline: IUML Releases First List of 25 Candidates for Kerala Assembly Elections 2026, Including Youth and Women for 27 Total Sea
signals.raw:
IUML Releases First List of 25 Candidates for Kerala Assembly Elections 2026, Including Youth and Women for 27 Total Seats | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Indian Union Muslim League (IUML), a key UDF ally, announced its initial candidates on March 17, 2026, for the Kerala Legislative Assembly elections set for April 9, 2026, naming contenders for 25 of 27 planned seats with a focus on younger face
